result: If I could change the world in one way, I would eliminate the capacity for organized, large-scale violence. This includes war, terrorism, and systemic oppression based on any form of identity. I believe the root of so much suffering stems from humanity's ability to inflict deliberate, widespread harm on each other. Eliminating this capacity would allow us to focus on cooperation, empathy, and building a world where everyone can thrive.
